/** * NCGAS Target Runtime Server (generated — do not edit; edit CustomHandlers.gs instead) * Compiled by NCGAS Builder. The blueprint below is DATA; behavior lives in * this audited runtime + ExpressionEngine.gs. */ var NCGAS_BLUEPRINT = "__NCGAS_BLUEPRINT_JSON__"; // ------------------------------------------------------------------ web app -- function doGet(e) { // Uploaded images are served through this same web app URL (?action=ncgas_image&fileId=...) // rather than made public in Drive — access is gated by the SAME auth check as every // other request below, not by Drive sharing settings. Checked first, before the normal // page-render path. if (e && e.parameter && e.parameter.action === 'ncgas_image') { return NcServeImage_(e); } var identity = NcIdentity_(); var settings = NCGAS_BLUEPRINT.meta.globalSettings; if (settings.authStrategy !== 'PUBLIC' && !identity.email) { return HtmlService.createHtmlOutput( '

403 — ' + NcEscapeHtml_(NCGAS_BLUEPRINT.meta.name) + '

' + '

Halaman ini memerlukan login akun Google Workspace domain Anda.

' ); } var tpl = HtmlService.createTemplateFromFile('Index'); tpl.bootBlueprintJs = NcJsEmbed_(JSON.stringify(NcFilterBlueprintFor_(identity))); tpl.bootIdentityJs = NcJsEmbed_(JSON.stringify(identity)); return tpl.evaluate() .setTitle(NCGAS_BLUEPRINT.meta.name) .addMetaTag('viewport', 'width=device-width, initial-scale=1'); } /** * Serves an uploaded Drive file's bytes directly (not a public Drive link). * Files stay owner-private in Drive; this is the only path that can read * them, and it requires the same identity check as the rest of the app. */ function NcServeImage_(e) { var identity = NcIdentity_(); var settings = NCGAS_BLUEPRINT.meta.globalSettings; if (settings.authStrategy !== 'PUBLIC' && !identity.email) { return HtmlService.createHtmlOutput('

403 Forbidden

'); } var fileId = e.parameter.fileId; if (!fileId) return HtmlService.createHtmlOutput('

400 Missing fileId

'); try { return DriveApp.getFileById(fileId).getBlob(); } catch (err) { return HtmlService.createHtmlOutput('

404 Not found

'); } } /** Run once from the script editor after the first deploy to grant scopes. */ function authorizeOnce() { SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet; // touch services so consent covers them Session.getActiveUser().getEmail(); DriveApp.getRootFolder(); GmailApp.getAliases(); return 'Authorized as ' + Session.getEffectiveUser().getEmail(); } // ----------------------------------------------------------------- identity -- function NcIdentity_() { var email = ''; try { email = Session.getActiveUser().getEmail(); } catch (err) { /* anonymous */ } return { email: email, roles: NcResolveRoles_(email) }; } function NcResolveRoles_(email) { var rbac = NCGAS_BLUEPRINT.rbac || {}; var map = rbac.roleMap || {}; if (email && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(map, email)) return map[email].slice(); if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(map, '*')) return map['*'].slice(); return []; } function NcHasAnyRole_(identity, roles) { if (!roles || !roles.length) return true; // empty list = every authenticated user for (var i = 0; i < roles.length; i++) { if (identity.roles.indexOf(roles[i]) !== -1) return true; } return false; } /** * SERVER-SIDE page RBAC: pages the user may not access are stripped from the * blueprint before it ever reaches the browser. Client-side visibility rules * are UX; this is the real boundary (services re-check on every call anyway). */ function NcFilterBlueprintFor_(identity) { var bp = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(NCGAS_BLUEPRINT)); Object.keys(bp.pages).forEach(function (pageId) { var allowed = bp.pages[pageId].settings.allowedRoles || []; if (allowed.length && !NcHasAnyRole_(identity, allowed)) delete bp.pages[pageId]; }); if (!bp.pages[bp.meta.globalSettings.homePage]) { bp.meta.globalSettings.homePage = Object.keys(bp.pages)[0] || null; } delete bp.rbac.roleMap; // don't leak the org's email->role directory to clients return bp; } // --------------------------------------------------------------------- RPC -- /** Single client entry: google.script.run.rpcApi(actionJson) -> envelope JSON. */ function rpcApi(requestJson) { var identity = NcIdentity_(); var request; try { request = JSON.parse(requestJson); } catch (e) { return NcFail_('BAD_PAYLOAD', 'Request is not valid JSON'); } if (NCGAS_BLUEPRINT.meta.globalSettings.authStrategy !== 'PUBLIC' && !identity.email) { return NcFail_('UNAUTHENTICATED', 'Sesi login tidak ditemukan.'); } if (request.action !== 'runService') { return NcFail_('UNKNOWN_ACTION', 'rpcApi hanya mendukung `runService`.'); } try { return NcOk_(NcRunService_(identity, request.payload || {})); } catch (e) { var code = e.ncCode || 'SERVER_ERROR'; console.error('[rpcApi] ' + code + ': ' + e.message); return NcFail_(code, e.message, e.ncDetails); } } function NcRunService_(identity, payload) { var serviceId = payload.serviceId; var inputs = payload.inputs || {}; var service = (NCGAS_BLUEPRINT.sharedServices || {})[serviceId]; if (!service) throw NcErr_('SERVICE_NOT_FOUND', 'Service `' + serviceId + '` tidak terdaftar di blueprint.'); // 1. RBAC gate — the 403 wall if (!NcHasAnyRole_(identity, service.allowedRoles)) { throw NcErr_('FORBIDDEN', '403 Forbidden: role Anda (' + (identity.roles.join(', ') || 'tanpa role') + ') tidak diizinkan menjalankan ' + serviceId + '.'); } // 2. Execution rules — same expression engine as the client, evaluated here var rules = (service.rules && service.rules.execution) || []; for (var i = 0; i < rules.length; i++) { var passed; try { passed = !!NCGASExpression.evaluate(rules[i].condition, { payload: inputs, user: identity, env: { serviceId: serviceId } }); } catch (e) { throw NcErr_('RULE_ERROR', 'Rule server gagal dievaluasi (' + rules[i].condition + '): ' + e.message); } if (!passed) throw NcErr_('RULE_BLOCKED', rules[i].errorMessage || 'Ditolak oleh aturan server.'); } // 3. dispatch switch (service.type) { case 'SHEET_READ': return NcSheetRead_(identity, service); case 'SHEET_APPEND': return NcSheetAppend_(identity, service, inputs); case 'SHEET_UPDATE': return NcSheetUpdate_(identity, service, inputs); case 'SHEET_DELETE': return NcSheetDelete_(identity, service, inputs); case 'REPORT_EXPORT': return NcReportExport_(identity, service, inputs); case 'EMAIL_SEND': return NcEmailSend_(identity, service, inputs); case 'PDF_EXPORT': return NcPdfExport_(identity, service, inputs); case 'DRIVE_UPLOAD': return NcDriveUpload_(identity, service, inputs); case 'GAS_RPC': return NcCustomRpc_(identity, service, inputs); default: throw NcErr_('UNSUPPORTED_TYPE', 'Tipe service `' + service.type + '` tidak dikenali runtime ini.'); } } // ------------------------------------------------------------ data services -- function NcOpenSheet_(service) { if (!service.spreadsheetId || service.spreadsheetId.indexOf('PASTE_') === 0) { throw NcErr_('CONFIG', 'spreadsheetId belum diisi pada definisi service.'); } var ss; try { ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(service.spreadsheetId); } catch (e) { throw NcErr_('SHEET_ACCESS', 'Spreadsheet tidak dapat dibuka (' + service.spreadsheetId + '): ' + e.message); } var sheet = service.sheet ? ss.getSheetByName(service.sheet) : ss.getSheets()[0]; if (!sheet) throw NcErr_('SHEET_ACCESS', 'Sheet `' + service.sheet + '` tidak ada di spreadsheet.'); return sheet; } /** * Data Boundary Isolation: when service.dataBoundary.ownerColumn is set, rows * are filtered to the caller's email. Roles in dataBoundary.bypassRoles * (default ['Admin']) see everything. */ function NcBoundaryActive_(identity, service) { var boundary = service.dataBoundary; if (!boundary || !boundary.ownerColumn) return null; var bypass = boundary.bypassRoles || ['Admin']; return NcHasAnyRole_(identity, bypass) ? null : boundary; } function NcSheetRead_(identity, service) { var sheet = NcOpenSheet_(service); var values = sheet.getDataRange().getValues(); if (values.length < 1) return []; var headers = values[0].map(String); var boundary = NcBoundaryActive_(identity, service); var ownerIdx = boundary ? headers.indexOf(boundary.ownerColumn) : -1; if (boundary && ownerIdx === -1) { throw NcErr_('BOUNDARY_CONFIG', 'Kolom boundary `' + boundary.ownerColumn + '` tidak ditemukan di header sheet — akses ditolak (fail closed).'); } var rows = []; for (var r = 1; r < values.length; r++) { if (boundary && String(values[r][ownerIdx]).toLowerCase() !== identity.email.toLowerCase()) continue; var obj = {}; for (var c = 0; c < headers.length; c++) obj[headers[c]] = values[r][c]; rows.push(obj); } var max = service.maxRows || 2000; return rows.slice(0, max); } function NcSheetAppend_(identity, service, inputs) { var sheet = NcOpenSheet_(service); var lastCol = Math.max(1, sheet.getLastColumn()); var headers = sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, lastCol).getValues()[0].map(String); if (!headers.filter(Boolean).length) { throw NcErr_('SHEET_SCHEMA', 'Baris pertama sheet harus berisi nama kolom (header).'); } var record = {}; Object.keys(inputs).forEach(function (k) { record[k] = inputs[k]; }); // auto-generate the key column when the caller didn't supply one (typical for CRUD_TABLE // "add" forms, which hide the key field) — opt-in via service.keyColumn, backward compatible // with plain SHEET_APPEND services that never set it. if (service.keyColumn && headers.indexOf(service.keyColumn) !== -1 && (record[service.keyColumn] === undefined || record[service.keyColumn] === '')) { record[service.keyColumn] = Utilities.getUuid().slice(0, 8); } // boundary on write: the owner column is ALWAYS the caller, never client input if (service.dataBoundary && service.dataBoundary.ownerColumn) { record[service.dataBoundary.ownerColumn] = identity.email; } if (headers.indexOf('submitted_at') !== -1 && record.submitted_at === undefined) { record.submitted_at = new Date().toISOString(); } var row = headers.map(function (hdr) { return record[hdr] !== undefined ? record[hdr] : ''; }); sheet.appendRow(row); return { appended: 1, key: record[service.keyColumn], columnsMatched: headers.filter(function (hdr) { return record[hdr] !== undefined; }).length }; } /** Locates the row (1-based sheet row number, including header) whose keyColumn matches keyValue. */ function NcFindRowIndex_(sheet, headers, keyColumn, keyValue) { var keyIdx = headers.indexOf(keyColumn); if (keyIdx === -1) throw NcErr_('SHEET_SCHEMA', 'Kolom kunci `' + keyColumn + '` tidak ditemukan di header sheet.'); var values = sheet.getDataRange().getValues(); for (var r = 1; r < values.length; r++) { if (String(values[r][keyIdx]) === String(keyValue)) return { rowNumber: r + 1, rowValues: values[r] }; } return null; } /** Enforces dataBoundary ownership on an already-located row; throws FORBIDDEN if the caller doesn't own it. */ function NcCheckRowOwnership_(identity, service, headers, rowValues) { var boundary = NcBoundaryActive_(identity, service); if (!boundary) return; var ownerIdx = headers.indexOf(boundary.ownerColumn); if (ownerIdx === -1) { throw NcErr_('BOUNDARY_CONFIG', 'Kolom boundary `' + boundary.ownerColumn + '` tidak ditemukan — akses ditolak (fail closed).'); } if (String(rowValues[ownerIdx]).toLowerCase() !== identity.email.toLowerCase()) { throw NcErr_('FORBIDDEN', '403 Forbidden: baris ini bukan milik Anda.'); } } function NcSheetUpdate_(identity, service, inputs) { var sheet = NcOpenSheet_(service); var lastCol = Math.max(1, sheet.getLastColumn()); var headers = sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, lastCol).getValues()[0].map(String); var keyValue = inputs.key; if (keyValue === undefined || keyValue === null || keyValue === '') { throw NcErr_('MISSING_KEY', 'SHEET_UPDATE membutuhkan `key` pada inputs.'); } var found = NcFindRowIndex_(sheet, headers, service.keyColumn, keyValue); if (!found) throw NcErr_('NOT_FOUND', 'Baris dengan ' + service.keyColumn + ' = ' + keyValue + ' tidak ditemukan.'); NcCheckRowOwnership_(identity, service, headers, found.rowValues); var boundary = NcBoundaryActive_(identity, service); var record = (inputs.record && typeof inputs.record === 'object') ? inputs.record : {}; var newRow = headers.map(function (hdr, i) { if (hdr === service.keyColumn) return found.rowValues[i]; // identity column never changes via update if (boundary && hdr === boundary.ownerColumn) return found.rowValues[i]; // ownership never changes via update return record[hdr] !== undefined ? record[hdr] : found.rowValues[i]; }); sheet.getRange(found.rowNumber, 1, 1, headers.length).setValues([newRow]); return { updated: 1 }; } function NcSheetDelete_(identity, service, inputs) { var sheet = NcOpenSheet_(service); var lastCol = Math.max(1, sheet.getLastColumn()); var headers = sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, lastCol).getValues()[0].map(String); var keyValue = inputs.key; if (keyValue === undefined || keyValue === null || keyValue === '') { throw NcErr_('MISSING_KEY', 'SHEET_DELETE membutuhkan `key` pada inputs.'); } var found = NcFindRowIndex_(sheet, headers, service.keyColumn, keyValue); if (!found) throw NcErr_('NOT_FOUND', 'Baris dengan ' + service.keyColumn + ' = ' + keyValue + ' tidak ditemukan.'); NcCheckRowOwnership_(identity, service, headers, found.rowValues); sheet.deleteRow(found.rowNumber); return { deleted: 1 }; } // ---------------------------------------------------------- report + email -- function NcReportExport_(identity, service, inputs) { var rows; if (service.source && service.source.spreadsheetId) { rows = NcSheetRead_(identity, { spreadsheetId: service.source.spreadsheetId, sheet: service.source.sheet, dataBoundary: service.dataBoundary, maxRows: service.maxRows }); } else if (Array.isArray(inputs.rows)) { rows = inputs.rows; } else { throw NcErr_('CONFIG', 'REPORT_EXPORT butuh service.source.spreadsheetId atau inputs.rows (array).'); } if (!rows.length) throw NcErr_('EMPTY_REPORT', 'Tidak ada data untuk diekspor.'); var format = String(inputs.format || service.format || 'csv').toLowerCase(); var stamp = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-'); var baseName = (service.fileName || 'ncgas_report') + '_' + stamp; var folder = NcReportFolder_(); if (format === 'csv') { var csv = NcToCsv_(rows); var file = folder.createFile(baseName + '.csv', csv, 'text/csv'); return { url: file.getUrl(), fileId: file.getId(), rows: rows.length, format: 'csv' }; } if (format === 'xlsx') { var temp = SpreadsheetApp.create('tmp_' + baseName); var headers = Object.keys(rows[0]); var data = [headers].concat(rows.map(function (row) { return headers.map(function (hdr) { return row[hdr] !== undefined ? row[hdr] : ''; }); })); temp.getSheets()[0].getRange(1, 1, data.length, headers.length).setValues(data); SpreadsheetApp.flush(); var exportUrl = 'https://www.googleapis.com/drive/v3/files/' + temp.getId() + '/export?mimeType=application%2Fvnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'; var res = UrlFetchApp.fetch(exportUrl, { headers: { Authorization: 'Bearer ' + ScriptApp.getOAuthToken() }, muteHttpExceptions: true }); if (res.getResponseCode() !== 200) { throw NcErr_('EXPORT_FAILED', 'Export XLSX gagal (' + res.getResponseCode() + '): ' + res.getContentText().slice(0, 200)); } var blob = res.getBlob().setName(baseName + '.xlsx'); var out = folder.createFile(blob); DriveApp.getFileById(temp.getId()).setTrashed(true); return { url: out.getUrl(), fileId: out.getId(), rows: rows.length, format: 'xlsx' }; } throw NcErr_('CONFIG', 'Format report tidak didukung: ' + format + ' (pakai csv atau xlsx).'); } function NcReportFolder_() { var name = 'NCGAS_Reports'; var it = DriveApp.getFoldersByName(name); return it.hasNext() ? it.next() : DriveApp.createFolder(name); } /** * PDF_EXPORT — converts an already-rendered HTML string (e.g. a PRINT_BUTTON * receipt) to a PDF saved in Drive. Fidelity is basic (GAS's HTML->PDF blob * conversion, not a full browser rendering engine) — fine for simple receipts * and reports, not pixel-perfect layouts. */ function NcPdfExport_(identity, service, inputs) { var html = inputs.html; if (!html || typeof html !== 'string') throw NcErr_('MISSING_FIELD', 'PDF_EXPORT membutuhkan `html` pada inputs.'); var folder = NcReportFolder_(); var stamp = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-'); var baseName = String(service.fileName || inputs.fileName || 'ncgas_doc').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]+/g, '_') + '_' + stamp; var htmlBlob = Utilities.newBlob(html, 'text/html', baseName + '.html'); var pdfBlob = htmlBlob.getAs('application/pdf').setName(baseName + '.pdf'); var file = folder.createFile(pdfBlob); return { url: file.getUrl(), fileId: file.getId() }; } function NcUploadFolder_(service) { var name = service.folderName || ('NCGAS_Uploads_' + NCGAS_BLUEPRINT.appId); var it = DriveApp.getFoldersByName(name); return it.hasNext() ? it.next() : DriveApp.createFolder(name); } /** * Saves an uploaded file to Drive, owner-private (no sharing changes) — it's * only ever readable through NcServeImage_ (doGet ?action=ncgas_image), which * re-checks identity on every request. Never make this folder/file public; * that would defeat the whole point of gating access through the app itself. */ function NcDriveUpload_(identity, service, inputs) { if (!inputs.filename || !inputs.base64) { throw NcErr_('MISSING_FIELD', 'DRIVE_UPLOAD membutuhkan filename dan base64 pada inputs.'); } var maxMB = service.maxSizeMB || 5; var bytes; try { bytes = Utilities.base64Decode(inputs.base64); } catch (e) { throw NcErr_('BAD_PAYLOAD', 'base64 tidak valid: ' + e.message); } if (bytes.length > maxMB * 1024 * 1024) { throw NcErr_('TOO_LARGE', 'Ukuran file melebihi batas ' + maxMB + 'MB.'); } var folder = NcUploadFolder_(service); var blob = Utilities.newBlob(bytes, inputs.mimeType || 'application/octet-stream', inputs.filename); var file = folder.createFile(blob); var url = ScriptApp.getService().getUrl() + '?action=ncgas_image&fileId=' + file.getId(); return { fileId: file.getId(), url: url }; } function NcToCsv_(rows) { var headers = Object.keys(rows[0]); var esc = function (v) { var s = v === null || v === undefined ? '' : String(v); return /[",\n]/.test(s) ? '"' + s.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"' : s; }; var lines = [headers.map(esc).join(',')]; rows.forEach(function (row) { lines.push(headers.map(function (hdr) { return esc(row[hdr]); }).join(',')); }); return lines.join('\r\n'); } /** * Workspace Emailing Engine — {{token}} templates resolved from inputs + * identity, every value HTML-escaped before hitting the template. * Attachments: inputs.attachments = [{ name, mimeType, base64 }] */ function NcEmailSend_(identity, service, inputs) { var scope = {}; Object.keys(inputs).forEach(function (k) { scope[k] = inputs[k]; }); scope.email = scope.email || identity.email; var interpolate = function (template) { return String(template || '').replace(/\{\{\s*([a-zA-Z0-9_.]+)\s*\}\}/g, function (_, key) { var v = scope[key]; if (v === undefined || v === null) throw NcErr_('TEMPLATE_TOKEN', 'Token email {{' + key + '}} tidak ada di inputs.'); return NcEscapeHtml_(String(v)); }); }; var to = interpolate(inputs.to || service.to); if (!to || !/@/.test(to)) throw NcErr_('CONFIG', 'Alamat tujuan email tidak valid: `' + to + '`'); var subject = interpolate(inputs.subject || service.subject || '(tanpa subjek)'); var html = interpolate(service.htmlTemplate || '

{{message}}

'); var attachments = []; (inputs.attachments || []).forEach(function (att, i) { if (!att || !att.base64 || !att.name) throw NcErr_('ATTACHMENT', 'Attachment #' + i + ' butuh { name, mimeType, base64 }.'); attachments.push(Utilities.newBlob(Utilities.base64Decode(att.base64), att.mimeType || 'application/octet-stream', att.name)); }); GmailApp.sendEmail(to, subject, html.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' '), { htmlBody: html, attachments: attachments, name: NCGAS_BLUEPRINT.meta.name }); return { sent: true, to: to, attachments: attachments.length }; } // ------------------------------------------------------------- custom RPC -- function NcCustomRpc_(identity, service, inputs) { var fnName = service.functionName; if (typeof CustomHandlers === 'undefined' || typeof CustomHandlers[fnName] !== 'function') { throw NcErr_('NOT_IMPLEMENTED', 'GAS_RPC `' + fnName + '` belum diimplementasi. ' + 'Buka editor project ini, isi CustomHandlers.gs dengan fungsi tersebut, lalu simpan.'); } return CustomHandlers[fnName](inputs, { user: identity, blueprint: NCGAS_BLUEPRINT }); } // ---------------------------------------------------------------- helpers -- function NcOk_(data) { return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, data: data }); } function NcFail_(code, message, details) { return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, error: { code: code, message: message, details: details || null } }); } function NcErr_(code, message, details) { var e = new Error(message); e.ncCode = code; e.ncDetails = details; return e; } function NcEscapeHtml_(s) { return String(s).replace(/&/g, '&').replace(//g, '>') .replace(/"/g, '"').replace(/'/g, '''); } function NcJsEmbed_(json) { return json.replace(/<\//g, '<\\/').replace(/\u2028/g, '\\u2028').replace(/\u2029/g, '\\u2029'); }
